title: NFT-fi on Hyperliquid with @hypurrblades
summary_title: NFT lending, launchpad raffles, and an imposter game coming to Hyperliquid
summary_description: Hyperblades is launching a lending platform, NFT marketplace, raffle-based launchpad, and play-to-earn game on Hyperliquid.

key_moments.label: Zerk introduces Hyperblades, a new NFT-fi platform on Hyperliquid
Testnet mint succeeded with 10,000 contract requests on Hyper-EVM
Frank explains the raffle system launchpad launching in two days
Lending platform lets users test NFTs for 2-7 days before buying
Raffle method: whitelisted users guaranteed one NFT, others compete for tickets
Mainnet lending protocol launching within two weeks of testnet
Frank teases imposter-themed play-to-earn game launching with platform

pull_quote: Lending is to get more hype, like if somebody needs hype as collateral or wants to admit more NFTs, they can offer their NFT as collateral.
